problems.diagnostic: Ardupilot_Software (identifier) is not a package or a property set visible or existing
problems.cause: Invalid package reference in AGREE annex
problems.minimal_edit: Remove or rewrite any reference to Ardupilot_Software as a package or property set in the AGREE annex

executor_steps: Identify and remove any usage of Ardupilot_Software as a package or property set in the AGREE annex
Ensure the AGREE annex only references visible identifiers from the AADL model
Verify that the guarantee expression uses only visible symbols: gps_pos, gps_pos.latitude, gps_pos.longitude, gps_pos.altitude, speed, angle
